Post VIX-expo - Intraday post (17/Dec)

Weekly post:

OpEx, VIX expo, CPI and BoJ meeting - Weekly post (15-19/Dec)

Market sells front-end vol and slightly bids the long-end. Realized volatility has reverted to 14.12% (right into my target). This is a good sign.The more we range, the more supportive liquidity is built here. I marked this gap last week as a very important zone where market must build structure in order to get an EOY rally. Seems like market thinks the same, as they constantly selling volatility there, juicing up liquidity.We have data heavy week, plus BoJ rate decision tomorrow and post-OpEx flow next week.Market needs to prove its confidence in this zone during these events, and it will be likely tested on next Monday and Tuesday before market starts to go up.

If the test fails or confidence shifts, market will start to grind lower to 6400.Very low probability, market bets on the opposite, it doesn’t expect anything until late Q1 to Q2.But keep your eyes open…

Let’s look at today’s positioning and levels…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Speed profile remains negative, mostly to the downside, but also upside vol started to bid. Intraday upward vomma is sold, as customers want stabilization.

Centroid is at 6793.56 - 6782.63, it also functions today as a line in the sand.

Downside pivot is at 6755.69with downside target of 6742.46 where most of the downside vol selling clusters. This is a sticky zone.However, the left-tail scenario is that if vol catches up here and market shows strenght at 6730, it can grind down to 6700 and pin there. Low probability, but never zero.

Upside pivot is at 6842.64with upside target of 6857.49, here spot starts to stabilize and pin to this.If upside pivot rejects, it will likely reverse down to the centroid and then pin to 6820

On options front, the day mostly favors for premium collection.I would play directional with futs. Looks like we can get some move. VIX expo looks to give a low impact on some vol buyback flow as market rolled into almost the same position with more bet on ranging and downside grind.Market bets on that volatility will hit my target at 14-13% (it is currently at 14.12%)…

OptionsDepth Heatmap
